name: shoot-and-scale-content-system
description: Shoot & Scale's content engine, rebuilt linear. Six skills: run (the guided conductor), snapshot, bullseye, analyze (deep-reads the client's OWN videos into a living Content Analysis doc + surfaces format candidates), create-format (bank a reusable format), and produce (pitch the format split, write hook-graded scripts, and build the branded doc in one). Topics never gate; formats are bank-only; competitor analysis is out of the workflow. Runs on Sandcastles.
